title: Victim loses $20,000 to ubank impersonator — scammer posed as fraud team citing unauthorised transaction, obtained card details and OTP codes by phone to drain account.
ASIC warns of fake crypto trading platforms promoted through WhatsApp and social media groups targeting young Australians.
Australians lost $2.18 billion to scams in 2025 with investment scams leading at $837.7 million, per ACCC Targeting Scams Report.
AFP and JPC3 warn of bank impersonation scams using cloned hold music and tag-team calls to bypass security checks.
Scamwatch and ACMA issue joint alert on mobile phone fraud where criminals take control of phone numbers to access accounts.
ASIC removed nearly 12,000 AI-powered investment scam websites in 2025, a 90% increase from the previous year.
ATO and ASIC warn of SMSF scams luring Australians into illegal early superannuation access through fake schemes.
AFP warns scammers impersonate police using fake ReportCyber reports to steal cryptocurrency wallet seed phrases.
Romance scam losses rose 21.8% in 2025 to $28.6 million, with over 80% of contact occurring via social media and dating apps.
Victorian man sentenced for bulk phone porting scam that stole mobile numbers to access victims' bank accounts.
CommBank warns of fraudulent letters impersonating ASIC requesting fund transfers to fake 'secure accounts'.
ACCC flagged massive mortgage fraud with billions in loans secured using AI-generated synthetic documents.
Global data breach affects 200 million via Canvas platform including Australian schools, universities and TAFEs.
